role: Son of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei; unofficial power broker
bio: Mojtaba Khamenei is the second son of [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei) and widely reported to be one of the most powerful behind-the-scenes figures in the Islamic Republic. He is alleged to have played a central role in the crackdown on the [Green Movement](/events/green-movement-protests-2009) in 2009 and to coordinate between the Supreme Leader's office and the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) and [Basij](/orgs/basij). He married a daughter of [Gholam-Ali Haddad-Adel](/people/gholam-ali-haddad-adel), cementing ties between the supreme leadership and the conservative parliamentary establishment. He has been subject to US and EU sanctions.
editorial_notes: No formal government title. Widely considered key power broker. Subject to US/EU sanctions.
